title: Tunderbird lässt sich nicht als Standard-App für E-Mail einstellen. -- I want to get Thunderbird as standard app, but it does'nt work.
creator: Samuel
content:
Ich habe Thunderbird als Standard-App für E-Mail eingestellt und Gmail dafür abgewählt. Doch wenn ich einen E-Mail-Link klicke, sprich tippe, gibt es entweder gar keine Reaktion oder Gmail will den Link öffnen. "Rechtsklick", sprich langes Tippen funktioniert. --

I have toggled thunderbird as standard and gmail off. But either there is no reaction at all, if I click an email link, or gmail wants to open it.

title: App doesn't work properly after update
creator: GrumpyMonkey
content: After the recent update, I have duplicated icons for K9. I exported my settings and reinstalled the app, then re-imported my settings. All my email accounts came back. However, only one works the rest fail authentication. I think I can fix that. However, the one account that does work, downloads every email 3 times. I have some email that have come down 6 times. How do I stop that. I have used K9 for years with no problems until now.
